codeReview.summary: Created comprehensive tests for Footer component with 19 test cases covering rendering, social links, category links, about links, help links, and legal links. All tests pass.

issues.description: Only the first 3 category links are tested for correct href values. The remaining 4 category links (Vêtements, Technologie, Extérieurs, Loisirs) are only tested for presence, not href correctness. However, this is a minor gap since the href patterns are consistent.
Dark mode styling class (dark:bg-[#1C1929]) from Footer component is not tested. The test only verifies light mode classes. This is minor as dark mode is typically tested at integration level.

summary: The implementation is complete and passes all tests. The worker correctly followed existing project testing patterns (mocking @inertiajs/react Link, using @testing-library/react, descriptive test names). 19 tests cover: footer rendering, logo, tagline, Twitter/Instagram social links, 7 category links, about section, help section, legal links, copyright, styling classes, and grid layout. No blocking issues found.
